markdown:
# Boon of Recovery

You gain the following benefits.

## Last Stand

When you would be reduced to 0 [[hit_points Points]], you can drop to 1 [[hit_points Point]] instead and regain a number of [[hit_points Points]] equal to half your [[hit_points Point]] maximum. Once you use this benefit, you can't use it again until you finish a [[long_rest Rest]].

## Recover Vitality

You have a pool of ten d10s. As a [[bonus_action Action]], you can expend dice from the pool, roll those dice, and regain a number of [[hit_points Points]] equal to the roll's total. You regain all the expended dice when you finish a [[long_rest Rest]].
